#  Enterprise Quantum  
Supercharge your R&D with BlueQubit
Our enterprise, defense and academic customers implement gate-based quantum algorithms today using our Quantum Software as a Service platform on their hardware of choice.
[Get Started ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/639acb0f16d4d943650fe023_Arrow-Right.svg)](https://www.bluequbit.io/platform)
### Trusted By
We partner with the leading quantum, scientific and enterprise players to deliver the best results
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/66670dfdfe636534133d81be_ibm_grey_logo.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/66670de695e0670449505c66_honda_grey_logo.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/63d75c459c1d3769e24e5cce_stanfort.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/63d75c77883e45af0c2319b6_aws.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/66671c546c773df025f8704c_quantinuum_grey_logo.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/63d75c9dcdfd66a01227460a_nvidia.svg)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/66670de688b1091df8dd2b44_guidewire_grey_logo.svg)
## Connect to   
IBM Heron and Quantinuum H2 QPUs
Unlock the full potential of quantum computing with BlueQubit! Our platform supports the best Quantum Computers - IBM Heron and Quantinuum H2 QPUs, enabling you to run thousands of gates and powerful utility circuits seamlessly.
IBM Fez
IBM Heron is IBM’s latest, most powerful QPU
156 qubits
1-qubit fidelity
99.97%
2-qubit fidelity
99.7%
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/674634e38e80ad8ac5bf2ee2_C-IMG_IBM-FEZ.webp)
Quantinuum H2
H2 is Quantinuum’s latest, most powerful QPU
56 qubits
1-qubit fidelity
99.997%
2-qubit fidelity
99.85%
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/6744f7f438c0225182c0ea47_IMG-Quantinuum.webp)
### Testimonials
Previous
The BlueQubit platform has proven invaluable for POLARISqb's gate-based quantum research to solve large combinatorial optimization problems for drug discovery. Its ability to rapidly train parameters for our QAOA solution allowed us to test and iterate effectively, leading to an optimal outcome. The integration with Pennylane made transitioning from AWS Braket to the Blue Qubit platform seamless, enabling us to leverage GPU-based simulators with minimal configuration.
**Maurice Benson**
Principal Software Engineer at POLARISqb
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/6675e18a50867e8744e25769_logo_polarisqb.png)
Collaborating with Bluequbit has been a great experience for Quantum Art. Their innovative quantum machine learning algorithms show promising potential when combined with our scalable trapped-ion based quantum computing full-stack systems. The synergy between our systems and Bluequbit's software brings us closer to full scale commercial quantum advantage, in impactful areas such as image processing. The connection between the teams has been immediate and it is clear the collaboration brings value to both companies - a true win-win!
**Tal David**
Co-Founder and CEO @ Quantum Art
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/668dc4dbb775ef8c89dcef68_logo-quantum_art.png)
Guidewire and BlueQubit partnered together in an endeavor to translate real-world challenges into finding practical applications for Quantum Computers to address prevalent issues in P&C Insurance. As an example, BlueQubit assisted Guidewire in executing a 41-qubit, 16TB simulation to address the Capital Reserve challenge.
**Lewis Guignard**
Director of Data Science Solutions
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/668dc4db9665728ee88b91b8_logo-guidewire.svg)
BlueQubit's platform has been great for running large-scale quantum simulations, requiring near-zero setup and providing a seamless experience. Their managed GPU simulators deliver high performance, and the hybrid environment enables fast execution of variational circuits with minimal latency. I am glad we integrated their SDK into QED-C’s repo so anyone can run our benchmark circuits on BlueQubit’s platform.
**Tom Lubinski**
QED-C Technical Advisory Committee on Quantum Standards and Benchmarks
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/668dc4db7648d36dc6e0ce76_logo-QEDC.svg)

Their innovative quantum machine learning algorithms show promising potential when combined with our scalable trapped-ion based quantum computing full-stack systems. The connection between the teams has been immediate and it is clear the collaboration brings value to both companies - a true win-win!
